steps.title: Multiply both sides by y
steps.content:
Starting with $b - 19 = \frac{x}{y}$, multiply both sides by $y$ to eliminate the fraction:

$$y(b - 19) = x$$

steps.title: Expand using the distributive property
steps.content:
Distribute $y$ across the terms:

$$x = by - 19y$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
